title: Wreck: the listing does not work
testCase: Does the image show — that is, is the path right?
blocks.0.text: Somebody wrote this listing. They were in a hurry. Run it and look at it as a buyer would.
blocks.1.text: The image is missing. The video is a black square that will not play. The model address is just letters — it does not click. One link in the menu leads nowhere. And that is only what you can see.
blocks.2.text: There is also something you CANNOT see, but which is just as broken. Look at the menu in the code.
blocks.3.text: I will not tell you what to fix
blocks.4.text: Until now every lesson showed you the problem and then the fix. Not this one. Here you have a broken page and what you know.
blocks.5.text: This is the real job. Nobody will come and tell you "line 14 is missing controls". You open something broken, you look at it, and you think.
blocks.6.text: Run it. See what is missing. Ask why. Fix it. Run it again.
blocks.8.text: That is how many there are. You have learned every one of them already. If you get stuck, go back — there is no shame in it, people who do this for a living do the same.
blocks.9.items.1: One is missing from the image entirely, and only a blind visitor notices.
blocks.9.items.2: One is a valueless word, without which the video is dead.
blocks.9.items.3: One looks like a menu but is not.
blocks.9.items.4: One looks like an address but does not click.
blocks.9.items.5: One is a link that leads into nothing. Look at it closely.
blocks.11.text: Above is how it should look when you are done. The menu is a list, the image shows, the video has buttons, the address is a link.
blocks.12.text: Your turn. Fix them. The test checks the image — but do not stop there, fix all six.
